amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

items.full_description: A charge provided to the garage operator that includes all anticipated applicable taxes related to the provision of the garage operator's parking spot.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
A fee determined by the garage operator to cover additional garage operator costs.

arrival.text: No need to pull a ticket! Pull up to our facility entrance and scan your SpotHero QR code to open the gate.
Once you have scanned your QR code, Follow signage and you may park anywhere that does not says "reserved". "
The Parking Spot shuttle will pick you up directly at your vehicle to take you to the airport.

departure.text: After your flight home, please call us when you land at (973) 621-2329, and proceed to the ground level of your terminal. The Parking Spot Haynes shuttle will meet you here and drive you straight back to your vehicle. Upon return, please claim your luggage and follow the pick up instructions on the Locator Slip provided by your shuttle driver.
The shuttle will bring you to your car. From there, follow the signs to the exit.

common.title: The Parking Spot Haynes - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 498 Route 1 and 9 S. This is The Parking Spot Haynes lot. It is located on the righthand side of Route 1. between Haynes Ave. and Station Rd.
restrictions: Complimentary bottled water is available at checkout.
For shuttle tracking and timing please use The Parking Spot app. Apple: LINK_TITLE
For shuttle tracking and timing please use The Parking Spot app. Android: LINK_TITLE
If you park outside your reservation times, you will be charged for each additional day upon exit.
Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!
The Parking Spot reservations are non-refundable and may not be cancelled.
The Parking Spot reservations may be changed up to 1 hour prior to your scheduled arrival time.

arrival.text: Enter on your right side, as indicated on the entrance sign. Proceed to the entrance gate and an attendant will greet you. Present your parking pass to the attendant for registration.
The valet will park your car.

There is an available shuttle that will provide transportation from the parking lot to the airport. You can either wait by your vehicle or proceed to the waiting area. Inform the driver which airline you are departing from, and our driver will transport you to the appropriate terminal. We will provide contact cards which include instructions on where to go for pick-up when you return.

departure.text: Please contact our office for pick-up using the contact card you were provided at the start of your trip.
When you’re ready to go, check in with the valet and your car will be retrieved.

common.title: Victoria Parking - Uncovered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 146 Haynes Ave. This is the Victoria Parking lot, operated by Victoria Parking. It is located on the North/Right-hand side of Haynes Ave. (a one-way street) between Bessemer St. and I-9 North. The entrance is accessed using I-9 North and following the signs for Bessemer St.
restrictions: A daily fee of $5 will be charged onsite for oversize vehicles.
Reservation Updates are not allowed if it has passed the Start Date of the reservation. Payment will need to be made directly on site.
The phone number for shuttle is 973-796-8922

arrival.text: Proceed to the entrance gate and scan your reservation, if you have one, underneath the scanner. If you are experiencing trouble scanning in your reservation, please take a ticket.
You will then enter the parking facility, and park in any open spot!

Complimentary shuttles are available to provide transportation from the parking lot to the airport. You can either wait by your vehicle or proceed to the office. If you decide to wait by your vehicle, please be visible and have your bags out. Inform your driver which airline or terminal you are traveling through, and our driver will transport you or your party to the appropriate terminal. We will provide contact cards which include instructions on where to go for pick-up upon your return!

departure.text: After arriving back at the airport, please contact our office for pick-up at 973-796-8922. The shuttles run approximately every 10 minutes.
Once at the parking lot, you may simply pull into the exit lane and scan your reservation underneath the scanner, and the gate will open to exit.
If the gate does not open, simply press the call button, located on the call box, to be assisted by one of our 24/7 attendants.

common.title: Victoria Parking - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 146 Haynes Ave. This is the Victoria Parking lot, operated by Victoria Parking. It is located on the North/Right-hand side of Haynes Ave. (a one-way street) between Bessemer St. and I-9 North The entrance is accessed using I-9 North and following the signs for Bessemer St.
restrictions: A daily fee of $5 will be charged onsite for oversize vehicles.
All regular sized vehicles will be accepted. That includes Minivans, SUVS, and pick-up trucks. However, we will NOT accept box trucks or RVs.
Complimentary bottled water is available at checkout.

Create an account on www.victoriaairportparking.com and start earning points for every day you park. Redeem your points, once accumulated, for free days! (Please note this cannot be added to a SpotHero reservation and any all fees associated will be payable directly to Victoria Parking.)
If you park outside your reservation times, you will be charged for each additional day upon exit.
Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!
Reservation Updates are not allowed if it has passed the Start Date of the reservation. Payment will need to be made directly on site.

arrival.text: When arriving, pull a parking ticket from the gate and proceed to an open parking space in the hotel's COVERED GARAGE.
The airport shuttle is located at the front of the hotel and runs every 20 minutes from the top of the hour.

departure.text: Upon return from your trip, you will need to take the Airtrain from your terminal to P3. You can track the shuttle by using www.trackmyshuttle.com, Hotel Code 1170.

When returning from your trip, you must bring your SpotHero Parking Pass and gate-issued ticket to the front desk of the hotel for validation before you get your car. For a smooth exit from the parking area, please stop at the front desk to have your parking voucher validated. You will insert the validated ticket at the gate upon departure. Once you've been validated, the gate will open, and you're free to go!

common.title: Hilton Newark Airport - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1170 Spring St. This is the Hilton Newark Airport lot. It is located on the west/righthand side of Spring St (a one-way street) between McClellan St and Adams Ave.
restrictions: Free shuttle runs 24/7 every 20 minutes. Please plan to arrive early. Track the shuttle using www.trackmyshuttle.com. The Hotel Code is 1170.
Please remember to stop by the front desk prior to exiting. The hotel will provide you a validated ticket to use when exiting. Do not pay at the machine.
If you have any questions, feel free to text the hotel at 908-300-3332.
Parking is at your own risk. The hotel assumes no liability for lost or stolen items.
Upon return from your trip, you will need to take the Airtrain from your terminal to P3. You can track the shuttle by using www.trackmyshuttle.com, Hotel Code 1170.

We look forward to welcoming you to the Hilton Newark Airport for your upcoming parking reservation. Please note, Hilton Hotels offer a great loyalty program, that benefits any Hilton guest with complimentary Wi-Fi access, Upgrades upon availability, and points for every dollar you spend staying with any Hilton brand. If you are not a member, please feel free to become one, ABSOLUTELY FREE! All points earned, will be eligible for complimentary stays within our Hilton family. Please click on the link to Hilton Honors to get started - https://www.hilton.com/en/hilton-honors/join/?OCODE=H295W

departure.text: 24/7 Free shuttle service to and from the EWR airport terminals which runs every 10-15 minutes daily for a fast drop-off and pick-up service, 365 days a year. Shuttle duration to/from EWR airport is generally 8-10 minutes each way but can vary with traffic conditions.
Upon arriving back to the lot, please present your email confirmation to the attendant or have access via a smart device to show the attendant.
You're free to go!

arrival.text: Please locate an open space in the rear of the parking area and bring your keys to the booth.
Gather your luggage and the attendant will guide you to where you board the shuttle.

departure.text: After retrieving your luggage, contact the shuttle at: (908) 994-1999 to schedule your pickup.
Board the shuttle and you will be returned to your vehicle.
When you are ready to go, you may simply leave!

common.title: E-Z Way Parking - Uncovered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1148 Adams Ave. This is the 1140 Spring St. - Uncovered Valet lot and is operated by E-Z Way Airport Parking.  It is located on the Northwest/Right-hand side of Adams Ave. between Spring St. and the end of Adams Ave.
restrictions: Note the Newark airport is undergoing construction which has been causing shuttle delays. Please allow yourself extra time.

arrival.text: Show the valet your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device.
The valet will hand you a ticket and will park your car. You must have this ticket in order to exit.
Free shuttle service to and from the airport terminals which runs every 10-15 mins daily, Our friendly staff are available to assist you 24/7. Follow staff instructions for shuttle pickup.

departure.text: Follow staff instructions for shuttle pickup. 862-704-0770 OR 862-704-0763.
When you're ready to go, show the valet your ticket and your car will be retrieved.

common.title: Maas Parking - EWR - Uncovered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location on Frelinghuysen Avenue. Arrive at 646-696 Frelinghuysen Ave. This is the valet stand for Maas Parking and is operated by ARB Parking.  It is located on the East Right-hand side of Frelinghuysen Ave. between Emerson Pl. and Whittier Pl.

arrival.text: When entering the facility, pull into the entry lane and scan your SpotHero reservation from your phone. The gate will open and you may enter. Find an open spot to self park your car. Walk to the nearest shuttle stop, and a bus will pick you up shortly. Make sure your car is parked centered in a spot or you may have to pay for 2 spots!
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".

THE SHUTTLE LEAVES THE LOT EVERY 30 MINUTES, AT THE TOP AND BOTTOM OF EACH HOUR. The driver of the bus will give you a card with all directions for picking up your vehicle when you return. If it's easier, just take a picture of both sides of the card so you have it with you.

departure.text: Upon return, no need to call. Simply follow directions on the card out to the pick-up area. Our shuttles leave the Pink Elephant lot every 30 minutes at the top and botton of each hour, so you can time your pick up accordingly. The shuttle will drop you directly at your car.

Follow the signs to the facility EXIT. Enter the exit lane, scan your SpotHero reservation and the gate will open to let you out unless a balance is due because you overstayed your reservation time. If your return plans change while traveling, there's no need to contact us. All adjustments can be handled upon exit.

common.title: Pink Elephant Long Term Parking - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 422 Frelinghuysen Ave. This is the Pink Elephant Long Term Parking lot, operated by Pink Elephant Long Term Parking. It is located on the East side of Frelinghuysen Ave. between Noble St. and Victoria St.
restrictions: Can not accept vehicles larger than 2500's or F250's

arrival.text: Scan your QR Code at the box with the red flashing lights. Hold the QR code about 2 inches away from the reader. You will be issued a ticket and the gate will open.
Proceed to the Hotel Front Desk to show the Front Desk Agent your SpotHero reservation and request the airport shuttle.
Head to the shuttle bus, as instructed by the Front Desk Agent. Shuttle leaves every 30 minutes between the hours of 4AM-12AM. Then from 12AM-4AM, the shuttle runs every 45-60 minutes.

departure.text:
After retrieving your luggage, please take the monorail to the P4 station.
Please call the hotel shuttle department at 908-436-4600 and request pick-up.The shuttle cannot pick-up passengers directly at the terminal, so you must be picked up at P4 station.
Upon returning to the hotel lot, simply leave when you're ready to go. Use the QR code on your parking pass at the exit to open the gate.

common.title: Renaissance Newark Airport Hotel - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1000 Spring St. This is the Renaissance Newark Airport Hotel lot, operated by MCR Investors. It is located on the West/Right-hand side of Spring St. (a one-way street) between Adams Ave. and Neck Ln.
restrictions: If there is an overstay customers will be required to pay additional fees upon exiting at then board rates.
Shuttle leaves every 30 minutes between the hours of 4:00 AM - 12:00 AM. Then from 12:00 AM - 4:00 AM, the shuttle runs every 45 minutes - 1 hour. For Shuttle Info: (908)-436-4600
When entering the facility please proceed left to the rear of the building to park.

arrival.text: When entering the facility, pull into the entry lane and scan your SpotHero reservation, either printed or mobile. The gate will open and you may enter. Follow the signs to the designated row to self park. Remain at your vehicle and wait for the shuttle to pick you up. Please make sure your vehicle is within the marked lines, otherwise may have to pay for 2 spots.
The shuttle driver will provide you a card with instructions for pick up. If convenient, you can take a picture of both sides of the card so you have it with you upon return.

departure.text: Upon return, no need to call. Simply follow the directions to the shuttle pick-up area. Our shuttles are routinely circling the pick up areas. The shuttle will drop you directly at your vehicle.
Follow the signs to the facility exit and enter either exit lane. Scan your SpotHero reservation and the gate will open (unless a balance is due because you overstayed your reservation time).
If your return plans change, there is no need to call us. All adjustments can be handled at the time of exit.

restrictions: Any 7+ passenger SUV/Minivan or larger will be subject to a $7/day surcharge, to be collected on-site.

Commercial or Super-Sized Vehicles vehicles, such as Sprinter Vans, may not be parked on-site.

common.title: SNAP Parking - Covered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 98 Frelinghuysen Ave. This covered valet garage is operated by Snap Parking. It is located on the east side of Frelinghuysen Ave. between Earl St. and Poinier St. The entrance is directly before the large red and beige garage.
restrictions: Estimated oversize fee of $3 daily for vehicles between 65” and 75” in height and over 180” in length, or any vehicle taller than 75”. These fees are to be paid directly to the facility upon exit if you did not include them with your reservation.

Please call SNAP for your pick-up after you claim your baggage and walk out at our designated pick-up points at each terminal. Currently, the following pick-up points are designated for your pick-up at each terminal: Terminal A: Go to the Parking Level, walk out to the street and wait at the traffic light near lane #6 Terminal B: Go to the Parking Level, cross over two streets to the middle island; lane #5, you should see a sign says SHARED RIDE SERVICES Terminal C: Go to the Baggage Level, cross over to center island lane #1.
There is a $6 airport service charge (one time fee), which is included in the total price.
This indoor lot offers extremely quick on-demand shuttle service to EWR at no additional cost. The shuttle ride lasts about 4 minutes.

arrival.text: Check-in at the facility office and show the attendant your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device.
The valet will hand you a ticket and will park your car. You must have this ticket in order to exit.
You may then board the Park2Go shuttle to EWR, which runs approximately every 10 minutes. Shuttle pick up is next to the facility's office.

departure.text: Upon your return to EWR, once you have secured your luggage please call the Park2Go shuttle at 908-352-9800. The shuttle runs approximately every 10 minutes. Please note: Shuttle pick up is at Terminal A, B, and C only. After you pick up your luggage at Terminal A & B, you must go down a floor to exit and proceed to the shuttle. For Terminal C, the Shuttle pick-up is located outside of the same floor.
When you're ready to go, show the valet your ticket and your car will be retrieved.

arrival.text: Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow.

Park your car in any space that's not reserved, then head into the lobby. Show your reservation to the Front Desk, where you will be issued a hangtag which needs to be left in your vehicle at all times while parked at the facility.

After placing the tag in your vehicle, head for the shuttle outside of lobby if needed! Passengers are dropped at P4 at the airport. From there you can take the air train to get to the different terminals.

departure.text: After landing, take the air train to P4. Shuttle will pick up during scheduled stops.
Return hangtag to frontdesk prior to leaving!
Simply leave when you're ready to go!
